name: example-parallel
goal: Demonstrate two concurrent-ready workers followed by a shared review.

sharedContext.summary: Use this file as a template for parallel local Claude orchestration. The first two tasks are independent and can run together; the final task reviews both outputs.
constraints: Keep work bounded to AI memory and orchestration guidance.
Do not edit TODO.md, ai/state files, ai/log files, or ai/indexes.

tasks.title: Inspect the AI memory contract
tasks.prompt: Read the agent workflow and AI memory guide. Summarize the hot-context rules and the two most important memory freshness requirements.

tasks.title: Inspect the orchestration runtime contract
tasks.prompt: Read the orchestrator guide and runtime script. Summarize the repo-local runtime layout, workspace modes, and the concurrency safety rules.

tasks.title: Review the combined concurrency contract
tasks.prompt: Review the dependency outputs. Call out any missing concurrency, runtime-root, or portability risk and propose one concrete coordinator follow-up.
